name: axxx-institute
description: AXXX-Institute Claude Code skills marketplace. Ships the axxx-skills plugin (paper-to-poster, MLSpace job skills, and future AXXX skills).

plugins.name: axxx-skills
plugins.description: AXXX-Institute skills bundle. paper-to-poster — build an AXXX-branded, print-ready academic conference poster from a paper; plus mlspace-jobs skills for scaffolding, first-time setup, and day-to-day operation of MLSpace GPU jobs.
